init.title: Elios4You Options
init.description:
Configure runtime options.

**Recovery Script Variables:**
When configured, the recovery script receives these variables:
- `device_name`: Device name
- `host`: IP address/hostname
- `port`: TCP port
- `serial_number`: Device serial number
- `mac_address`: Device MAC address
- `failures_count`: Number of consecutive failures

data.recovery_script: Recovery script (optional, runs when device stops responding)

lovelace_yaml_resource.title: Scheduler card requires manual Lovelace resource
lovelace_yaml_resource.description:
Your Lovelace dashboard is in **YAML mode**, so the Elios4You scheduler card cannot be registered automatically.

Add the following entry to your Lovelace YAML configuration:

```yaml
resources:
  - url: {resource_url}
    type: module
```

After adding it, reload your browser to load the card.

connection_failed.title: {device_name} is not responding
connection_failed.description:
The integration cannot communicate with your Elios4You device at {host}:{port}.

**Possible causes:**
- The device is powered off or not connected to the network
- The device is connected but not responding to commands (device may need a restart)
- The IP address has changed
- A firewall is blocking the connection
- The Telnet port is not accessible

**To resolve:**
1. Check that the device is powered on and connected to your network
2. Try restarting the device (power cycle)
3. Verify the IP address in your router's DHCP table
4. If the IP has changed, reconfigure the integration with the new address
